actions.analyzeDescription: Run a deep analysis on this chapter to surface craft metrics, findings, and suggestions.
actions.beautifyDescription: Restructure paragraphs and dialogues for cleaner formatting. Text stays unchanged.
prose.description: AI will revise the chapter text for clarity, rhythm, and style while preserving your voice.
confirm.notAnalyzed: This chapter hasn't been analyzed yet. Revision works best after analysis. Continue anyway?
confirm.longChapter: This chapter has {{wordCount}} words. Revising long chapters may take a while. Continue?
error.toast.invalid_key.title: Invalid API key
error.toast.invalid_key.body: {{provider}} rejected your API key. Open settings to re-enter it.
error.toast.insufficient_credits.title: Out of credits
error.toast.insufficient_credits.body: {{provider}} reports you're out of credits or have hit your billing limit.
error.toast.rate_limited.title: Too many requests
error.toast.rate_limited.body: {{provider}} is rate-limiting your account. Try again in a moment.
error.toast.overloaded.title: Provider is overloaded
error.toast.overloaded.body: {{provider}} is under heavy load right now. Try again in a minute.
error.toast.model_unavailable.title: Model unavailable
error.toast.model_unavailable.body: Your {{provider}} account doesn't have access to the model the assistant tried to use.
error.toast.context_too_long.title: Conversation too long
error.toast.context_too_long.body: This session exceeded {{provider}}'s context window. Archive it and start fresh.
error.toast.bad_request.title: Request rejected
error.toast.timeout.title: Request timed out
error.toast.timeout.body: The provider didn't respond in time. Try again.
error.toast.stale_version.title: Chapter has changed
error.toast.stale_version.body: Another change to this chapter landed while you were working. Reload to continue.
error.toast.unknown.title: AI request failed
findings.noAnalysis: Run an analysis to see findings.
nextChapter.noSuggestion: Analyze this chapter to get a suggestion for what comes next.
chat.requestFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
chat.emptyState: Ask anything about this chapter — characters, plot, style, or ideas.
preparation.title: AI Preparation
preparation.upgradeDescription: Upgrade to Pro to unlock AI-powered analysis, craft metrics, and writing assistance.
preparation.addApiKey: Add your API key in settings to enable AI features for this book.
preparation.unlockDescription: Analyze your manuscript's pacing, tension, craft and more — resulting in AI features.
preparationProgress.requiresProTitle: AI preparation requires a Pro license
preparationProgress.configureApiKeyTitle: Configure an AI provider API key first
prepareDialog.title: Prepare for AI
prepareDialog.description: Choose which steps to run on this book. Only the selected steps will be performed.
prepareDialog.step.semantic_index.label: Semantic index
prepareDialog.step.semantic_index.descri: Chunk and embed chapters to power AI chat and search.
prepareDialog.step.writing_style.label: Writing style
prepareDialog.step.writing_style.descrip: Capture the narrative voice and tone of your prose.
prepareDialog.step.chapter_analysis.desc: Summaries, tension, pacing and hook scores per chapter.
prepareDialog.step.wiki.label: Wiki & characters
prepareDialog.step.wiki.description: Extract characters, locations and other story entities.
prepareDialog.step.story_bible.label: Story bible
prepareDialog.step.story_bible.descripti: Themes, style rules, genre rules and a timeline.
prepareDialog.step.health.label: Manuscript health
prepareDialog.step.health.description: Compute craft health scores across the manuscript.
editorial.rewriteDescription: Revises this chapter with the unresolved feedback from your latest editorial review applied.
editorial.none: No editorial feedback for this chapter yet. Run an editorial review to see notes here and unlock feedback-driven rewrites.
